abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.d9208f9b7d827aec]{React Under Fire} using a shield as cover, add +1. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} in close quarters with it, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a strong hit.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} as you face off against a foe with your raised shield, preset your action die to 4. On a hit, take +2 momentum on a hit as your bold defense drives you into the heart of battle.

When forced to @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm} in a fight, you may instead secrifice your shield and ignore all harm. If you do, the shield is destroyed and you take +2 momentum. Once per fight, you also get in control when you sacrifice your shield to avoid harm.
